demographics.living_situation: lives at home with parents; uses a wheelchair

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up with a splitting headache, I feel completely exhausted, and I can't push this phlegm out of my chest.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He woke up this morning with a really bad headache and is worn out, and he can't cough the mucus up — he's had a bit of a cold for the last day.

symptom_narrative.onset: the headache and exhaustion came on this morning when he woke up; the cold started about a day ago
symptom_narrative.duration: headache and tiredness since waking today; cold about 24 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a bad throbbing headache across the whole head, feeling completely drained, and thick phlegm he can't clear
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says it's a splitting headache and he feels totally exhausted
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: head all over, and his chest feels full of phlegm
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst first thing this morning on waking
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: he says trying to cough tires him out and doesn't shift the phlegm
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: his breathing has been fast and shallow this morning and he can only speak in short sentences
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the parents say he's had chest infections before that needed a lot of help clearing his chest
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he uses a wheelchair and normally relies on his cough machine and a breathing mask at night; this morning he's too worn out to do much

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: muscle-wasting condition (Duchenne muscular dystrophy) diagnosed in early childhood — his muscles have got progressively weaker and he can't walk independently
past_medical_history.how_managed: specialist muscle/neuromuscular team, wheelchair, home cough-assist machine and a night-time breathing mask (BiPAP)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mild heart problem linked to the muscle condition, which he takes regular heart tablets for

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: 14-year-old, lives with parents who are present and made the call; wheelchair user; has home cough-assist and night-time breathing-mask equipment

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: known Duchenne muscular dystrophy with progressive muscle weakness; wheelchair-dependent; uses home cough-assist and nocturnal BiPAP

objective_data_offered.value: 90% on his home fingertip oximeter, breathing normal room air
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home fingertip oximeter; may be affected by cold fingers or movement

objective_data_offered.value: about 115 beats per minute on the home oximeter
parents say he is breathing fast and very shallow, roughly 28 breaths a minute, and can only speak in short sentences
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent estimate, not a device measurement

objective_data_offered.value: looks tired and flushed in the face; breathing looks rapid and shallow
his BiPAP machine is beside the bed; the parents say he kept pulling the mask off overnight because his nose was blocked from the cold
